title: IIT Bombay Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IIT Bombay Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? IIT Bombay Digital Technologies in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Bombay Digital Technologies:
IIT Bombay Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay Digital Technologies!
